API Reference

  • parseConfig
  • loadConfig
  • saveConfig

parseConfig(input, options)

Parses a configuration string and returns a structured Config object. Throws ParseError on malformed input.

Parameters

  • input (string) — The configuration source.
  • options (object) — Parser options:
    • strict (boolean, default true) — enables strict-mode validation.
    • encoding (string, default utf-8) — input character encoding.

Returns

A Config object on success.

Example

cfg, err := parseConfig(src, &Options{Strict: false})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Println(cfg.Section("database").Get("host"))

Errors

CodeMeaning
E001Unrecognised section.
E002Duplicate key.
E003Unterminated string literal.

See also: loadConfig, saveConfig.
